info.name: Smart Recruitment Platform - Web App
info.description: Web consumer collection for public website visitors, employer dashboard, admin dashboard, and supported web job seeker flows. TODO: add dedicated analytics/reporting endpoints here if the backend later exposes them.

request.description: Web App / Visitor: browse published jobs on the public website.
Web App / Visitor: view public job details.
Web App / Visitor: load public skill reference data.
Web App / Employer: create an employer account, company, and employer profile. Requires accepted terms; optional website and phone are persisted.
Web App / Employer: login and stores the returned Sanctum token in {{employer_token}}.
Web App / Admin: login and stores the returned Sanctum token in {{admin_token}}.
Web App / Employer/Admin: fetch the authenticated web-role user. Uses {{employer_token}} by default.
Web App / Employer/Admin: request a password reset email with generic success to avoid email enumeration.
Web App / Employer/Admin: reset password using a broker token from email or tests. Set {{reset_token}} before sending.
Web App / Employer/Admin: change password while authenticated. Uses {{employer_token}} by default.
Web App / Employer/Admin: revoke the current Sanctum token. Uses {{employer_token}} by default.
Web App / Employer/Admin: revoke all Sanctum tokens for the authenticated web-role user. Uses {{employer_token}} by default.
Web App / Employer Dashboard: load company profile.
Web App / Employer Dashboard: update company profile.
Web App / Employer Dashboard: load employer user profile.
Web App / Employer Dashboard: update employer contact profile.
Web App / Employer Dashboard: create a job posting.
Web App / Employer Dashboard: list employer-owned jobs.
Web App / Employer Dashboard: update owned job posting.
Web App / Employer Dashboard: attach required skills to a job.
Web App / Employer Dashboard: publish an owned job. Requires the employer company to be approved and creates a job.published audit log.

Web App / Employer Dashboard: pending companies can update their company profile but cannot publish jobs. Expected response is 403 when {{pending_employer_token}} belongs to a pending-company employer.

exec: pm.test('pending company blocked or auth missing', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([401, 403, 404]));

request.description: Web App / Employer Dashboard: close an owned job.
Web App / Employer Dashboard: delete an owned job posting.
Web App / Employer Dashboard: list applications for an owned job.
Web App / Employer Dashboard: view an application for an owned job.
Web App / Employer Dashboard: move an application through the pipeline.
Web App / Employer Dashboard: get explainable ranked candidates for a job.
Web App / Employer Dashboard: list test catalog entries available to employer.
Web App / Employer Dashboard: assign a test to an application.
Web App / Employer Dashboard: list tests assigned to an application.
Web App / Employer Dashboard: evaluate a submitted test attempt.
Web App / Employer Dashboard: schedule an interview for an application.
Web App / Employer Dashboard: list application interviews.
Web App / Employer Dashboard: update an interview.
Web App / Employer Dashboard: mark an interview as completed.
Web App / Employer Dashboard: submit interview evaluation.
Web App / Employer Dashboard: use status change endpoint for final accept/reject decisions. Accepted/rejected final decisions create application.accepted or application.rejected audit records.
Web App / Employer Dashboard: list employer notifications.
Web App / Employer Dashboard: get unread notifications count.
Web App / Admin Dashboard: list platform users.
Web App / Admin Dashboard: show a platform user.
Web App / Admin Dashboard: update user role.
Web App / Admin Dashboard: update user account status.
Web App / Admin Dashboard: list companies for approval.
Web App / Admin Dashboard: list companies filtered by approval status. Example statuses: pending, approved, rejected, suspended.
Web App / Admin Dashboard: approve a company.
Web App / Admin Dashboard: reject a company.
Web App / Admin Dashboard: suspend a company and block employer workflows.
Web App / Admin Dashboard: list skill catalog.
Web App / Admin Dashboard: create skill catalog item.
Web App / Admin Dashboard: update skill catalog item.
Web App / Admin Dashboard: delete skill catalog item.
Web App / Admin Dashboard: list assessment tests.
Web App / Admin Dashboard: create assessment test.
Web App / Admin Dashboard: update assessment test.
Web App / Admin Dashboard: delete assessment test.
Web App / Admin Dashboard: list general platform audit logs. ApplicationStatusHistory remains the source of truth for application status transitions.
Web App / Admin Dashboard: filter audit logs for a sensitive action such as job.published or company.approved.

item.name: Filter Audit Logs by Entity Type

request.description: Web App / Admin Dashboard: filter audit logs by backend entity class name.
Web App / Admin Dashboard: filter audit logs by the user who performed the action.
